contact.wechat_scan: Scan to add us on WeChat
contact.inquiry_note: Interested in this product? Reach us through any of the channels below.
factory.no_products: Our product catalog is being prepared — contact us for details.
factory.contact_note: Tell us what you need and we will get back with a quote and lead time.
factory.process_inquiry_note: Send the product and quantity — quote within 24 hours.
factory.process_sample_note: Free samples for approval before production starts.
factory.process_production_note: Full QC follow-up with weekly progress updates.
factory.process_shipping_note: Inspection passed, logistics arranged, documents in order.
factory.industry1_note: Components and assemblies supplied as complete sets
factory.industry4_note: Weatherproof, durable solutions for the field
factory.faq_a1: The minimum order quantity is listed on each product page; sample orders and mixed orders are negotiable — contact us to confirm.
factory.faq_a2: Yes. Samples ship in 3–7 days, and sample and shipping fees are credited against your bulk order.
factory.faq_q3: What is the typical lead time?
factory.faq_a3: 15–30 days for standard orders depending on volume and process; we share weekly production updates after ordering.
factory.faq_q4: Which payment terms do you accept?
factory.faq_a4: T/T, L/C and other standard trade terms — usually a 30% deposit with the balance before shipment.
dtc.cta_note: Questions about products or ordering? Reach out anytime — we usually reply within 24 hours.
dtc.faq_q1: How do I place an order?
dtc.faq_a1: Contact us via WhatsApp or email; once the style and quantity are confirmed we'll send payment and shipping details.
dtc.faq_q2: Which shipping options do you support?
dtc.faq_a2: International express and dedicated freight lines, with a tracking number after dispatch — delivery usually takes 7–15 days.
dtc.faq_q3: Can I return or exchange items?
dtc.faq_a3: Returns and exchanges are accepted within 30 days of delivery (items in resalable condition); we cover shipping for quality issues.
dtc.faq_a4: All products carry a 12-month warranty with free replacement for non-artificial defects — contact us for details.
